_meta.note: MIXED VERIFICATION — read per-entry flags before use. COUNTY commission entries are VERIFIED against the official Escambia County 'Elected Officials' page (myescambia.com/open-government/elected-officials, reviewed via screenshot 2026-07-17): names, districts, role-based emails (district{N}@myescambia.com), phones, and term expirations all match the official page. CITY council names, districts, and roles are confirmed against the official City of Pensacola staff directory (cityofpensacola.com/directory.aspx?did=7, screenshot 2026-07-17), but that directory shows emails only as 'Email Council <name>' LINKS — the addresses themselves were not visible, so every city email remains verified:false (pattern-style guesses) until confirmed by opening those links or asking the City Clerk. Phones were transcribed from phone-screen screenshots; re-verify before publishing them in any UI (two city phones were omitted as not clearly legible). Re-check the full roster each election cycle.

sources.city_council_roster: https://www.cityofpensacola.com/directory.aspx?did=7 (official city staff directory; reviewed via screenshot 2026-07-17 — emails link-only, not shown)

county_commission.body: Escambia County Board of County Commissioners
county_commission.email_note: Role-based per-district addresses (district{N}@myescambia.com), confirmed on the official Elected Officials page. Stable across elections; only the officeholder name changes.

city_council.email_note: Person-based addresses (firstinitial+lastname@cityofpensacola.com). Change with every election — MUST be re-confirmed (directory links or City Clerk) before public use.
city_council.roster_note: Names, districts, and roles for all 7 members confirmed against the official staff directory (2026-07-17). The directory renders emails as links without showing the address, so the email strings below are still pattern-inferred and unverified.
